description_long: This object is a decorative candle featuring a twisted, wood-like brown shaft and a prominent, elongated pink wax tip. The shaft has a textured, organic appearance, resembling a carved or natural branch, which adds a rustic charm. The pink wax at the top is shaped like a budding flower or flame, with smooth, rounded contours and a subtle sheen. The bottom of the candle is also tipped with pink wax, mirroring the top and providing a balanced, symmetrical look. There is no visible wick or flame, and the candle does not appear to be housed in any holder or base. The overall design suggests it is intended as a whimsical or fantasy-themed decorative piece, suitable for urban parks, themed streets, or public installations.
description: A decorative candle with a twisted brown shaft and pink wax tips at both ends, resembling a stylized flower bud. The design is rustic and whimsical, with no visible flame or holder.
description_view_0: The candle is seen with the pink wax tip facing forward, showing the twisted brown shaft and the smooth, rounded pink top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side profile of the pink wax tip and the full length of the twisted brown shaft, with the bottom pink tip slightly visible.
description_view_2: The candle is shown with the pink wax tip directly facing the viewer, emphasizing the symmetry and the central alignment of the shaft.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the candle is visible, displaying the pink wax tip and the twisted brown shaft, with the bottom pink tip more pronounced.
